creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
(In reply to linus.sundqvist from comment #5)
The version requirement of py-matrix-synapse on py-cryptography was made in response to the recent openssl vulnerability and does not reflect an actual requirement. This is also why we (after seeking approval from upstream) currently patch that depenency check from the port, as otherwise synapse checks required versions on start and refuses to run.

Are you using the quartlery branch? From a quick git diff w/ the 2021Q branch the cherry-picked commit does not incorporate that dependency patch, which would cause this problem. I feel like that's a bit out of my hands, perhaps Neel can fix this?
